meta.note: v1.2 强化角色主体不变量、turnaround 视图计划、身份牌、文字后期区和审查焦点。

source.source_design_path: projects/aigc/<项目名>/3-主体/角色/2-设计/<角色名>.md
source.reference_image_path: projects/aigc/<项目名>/3-主体/角色/3-生成/<主体ID>-<主体名称>-主图.<ext>

local_sync.local_asset_path: projects/aigc/<项目名>/3-主体/角色/3-生成/<主体ID>-<主体名称>-多视图.<ext>
local_sync.download_command: libtv download -p <LIBTV_CANVAS_UUID> -n <LIBTV_NODE_ID_OR_NAME> -o projects/aigc/<项目名>/3-主体/角色/3-生成 | not_applicable_when_already_present_or_copied

reference_context.role_label: character main image node / multiview reference

libTV.output_image_path: projects/aigc/<项目名>/3-主体/角色/3-生成/<主体ID>-<主体名称>-多视图.<ext>
libTV.output_prompt_path: projects/aigc/<项目名>/3-主体/角色/3-生成/<主体ID>-<主体名称>-多视图.json

must_preserve: same face identity, hair structure, skin tone and body proportion
same costume silhouette, layering, textile construction and role markers
same era, culture, social tier and narrative pressure
same signature accessories, scars, makeup, ritual marks or status details already present in the upstream design
same render style and material logic from the reference main image
may_vary: front, side, rear and three-quarter angle
expression state within upstream emotional direction
detail crop for costume or identity features

reference_policy.reference_image_role: continuity anchor for face, hair, body proportion, costume silhouette, material logic and render style

identity_badge.visual_style: small clean production badge, high contrast, secondary to the character turnaround
identity_badge.fallback: if exact text rendering fails, preserve a clean empty badge plate for post-production overlay and keep the full name in the JSON record

layout.sheet_intent: production turnaround and identity proof board for one character
layout.background: weathered charcoal production board with restrained technical grid
layout.module_spacing: clean production-review spacing, readable at a glance

production_view_plan.purpose: locks face, body proportion, costume silhouette and status markers
proves volume, layering and camera-ready identity
proves profile, hair structure, garment thickness and carried silhouette
proves back design, hair fall, costume closures and rear identity markers

production_view_plan.role: costume, symbolic detail, gesture and face states
production_view_plan.purpose: documents only design-existing details without replacing the main identity

layout_generation_prompt.canvas_setup: Create one cinematic character multi-view production sheet on a 16:9 landscape canvas. Use a restrained charcoal production-board base with subtle analog grain and a technical grid. The character remains dominant and the layout stays readable for production review.

modules.content: A compact color and material swatch grid derived only from the upstream character design prompt.
Hair structure, status markers, accessories, and one culture-coded motif that already exists in the upstream design.
One frontal hero view, one three-quarter view, one side view, and one rear silhouette verification view. Preserve the same identity from the reference main image.
Costume breakdown showing inner-to-outer layering, textile construction, damage or rank markers, and functional silhouette.
Close fragments of cuffs, hems, belts, ornaments, scars, makeup, or identity details already present in the design.
Three pose slots reflecting the upstream narrative pressure, social status, restraint, judgment, fatigue, ritual, or duty.
Expression slots preserving the same face, hair, makeup, scars, ritual marks, and emotional direction.

critical_requirements: Use the upstream character design document's section `4. 解构` as the primary source of truth; LLM must write prompt_text from that deconstruction after understanding the character, not by script concatenation, regex phrasing, synonym rotation, batch insertion, or mapping projection. Do not use the former English integrated prompt from `提示词设计` as the imported source for Midjourney V8.1.
The same-canvas reference main image node is the continuity anchor for face, hair, body proportion, costume silhouette, material logic, and render style.
Apply the subject invariant lock before arranging modules; every view must prove the same character identity.
Output must be a character multi-view production sheet, not a storyboard, poster, fashion editorial, or generic game turnaround.
Layout instructions organize views and modules but must not override identity, costume facts, era, style, role tier, or narrative pressure.
Preserve the same character identity across all views: same face, hair, skin tone, body proportion, costume system, and signature details.
Do not copy accidental artifacts from the reference image; preserve character continuity, not generation mistakes.

Reserve one fixed top-left identity badge area and visibly attempt the short ASCII subject ID `<CHAR_ID_ASCII_SAFE>`; if exact text rendering is unreliable, preserve the badge area for post-production overlay.
Costume modules must foreground role identity, era markers, ritual or social signals, textile construction, and practical silhouette.
Gesture and face modules must reinforce upstream narrative pressure rather than random attractive posing.
No new weapons, props, symbols, tattoos, scars, social rank markers, or costume elements unless they already exist in the upstream section `4. 解构`.

negative_drift_controls.identity_drift: do not change face structure, hair, skin tone, body proportion or signature identity details between modules
negative_drift_controls.costume_drift: do not replace costume system, role tier, textile construction, era markers or symbolic details
negative_drift_controls.pose_drift: gestures must reinforce upstream narrative pressure instead of random glamour posing
negative_drift_controls.layout_drift: do not turn the sheet into a poster, storyboard, fashion spread or text-heavy dossier

review_focus: same face identity across front, three-quarter, side and rear views
costume architecture remains consistent from inner to outer layers
expression and gesture states match upstream narrative pressure
detail callouts do not invent new marks, weapons, props or rank symbols
top-left identity badge has a visible short ID or a clean overlay-ready badge plate

prompt_segments.reference_instruction: Use reference_node_name from the same libTV canvas as the main identity and costume continuity anchor.
prompt_segments.negative_prompt_global: no redesign, no identity drift, no costume replacement, no unrelated scene, no extra characters, no storyboard panels, no fashion poster, no mixed rendering styles
prompt_segments.negative_prompt_layout: no unreadable clutter, no tiny duplicated faces, no random labels, no text-heavy blocks, no inconsistent module styles

prompt_payload.prompt_text: <LLM_AUTHORED_FROM_SOURCE_DECONSTRUCTION_TEXT_AND_MULTIVIEW_LAYOUT_INSTRUCTIONS; no script concatenation, regex phrasing, synonym rotation, batch insertion, or mapping projection>
